creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yuri I am going to reject this PR. I spoke with MaxMind and they confirmed that, while the URL you provided does work, it is not the server from which they prefer the database be downloaded.

They also indicated that they weren't aware of any specific reason why the current URL wouldn't work through Tor. That said, this PR will be crawled so the solution you proposed will be visible if people Google the problem in the future.
